subject: Re: Incident Report #2087
content:

subject: Re: Incident Report #2087
content:
Hi all,

Thanks for a productive Launch Retrospective today. Here's a summary of what we
decided:

DECISIONS:
- We will proceed with Option B for the User Directory migration (projected
savings: $225K/yr)
- Neptune launch date moved to Q1 (from original Q4 target)
- Operations team will own the AWS Cost Optimization workstream going forward

OPEN QUESTIONS:
- How does this affect the DataFlow Systems contract timeline? (Steve to
investigate)
- Do we need additional headcount for Product Manager? (Yuki to assess)

Full notes: https://confluence.internal/6802d88687da

Regards,
Quinn
--
Quinn Anderson
Oscorp | Engineering Department
Phone: +1-380-160-8355 | Email: quinn.anderson@oscorp.com

DISCLAIMER: The information contained in this email is intended only for the person or entity to which it is addressed and may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Unauthorized review, use, disclosure or distribution is prohibited.

subject: Re: Incident Report #2087
content:
Team,

Effective Monday, we're updating the Travel Reimbursement policy. Key changes:

1. Support approval is now required for any User Directory changes in production
(previously only staging required approval)
2. All PRs affecting Aurora must include load test results
3. EMEA deployments will follow a new rolling strategy
4. Incident response SLA updated: P1 = 19min, P2 = 49min

Full policy doc: https://wiki.internal/policies/03d7ed9fd0

Please review by EOD Wednesday and flag any concerns to Jack.

Thanks,
Quinn

subject: Re: Incident Report #2087
content:
Thanks Quinn,

I reviewed the spec for Data Governance. Some thoughts:

- Section 4 needs more detail on the rollback strategy
- The churn rate numbers in Table 4 don't match what I see in the Payment
Gateway dashboard (showing 57% vs your 60%)
- Can we add a dependency map for the API Gateway integration?
- The timeline for HR involvement seems optimistic

Happy to discuss in our Wednesday sync.

Cheers,
Yuki
---
Yuki Gonzalez | Principal Engineer
Lexcorp
